title: Western blot - TBK1 (Cell Signaling, #51872S) protein expression

steps: Follow the general western blot protocol: General western blot protocol by Jailyn Izu Protocol-specific parameters: For total protein loading amounts in Step 3 , load 5 µg of total protein for each sample (calculate from Bradford Assay) Skip Steps 11 & 12 (normalizing to ERK1 instead of total protein) For the TBK1 primary antibody (Cell Signaling, #51872S) in Step 14 , use a 1:1000 dilution (v/v) in blocking buffer: 6 mL Licor blocking buffer solution + 6 μl Tween20 (0.1%) + 6 µL TBK1 primary antibody
creator: Christopher Bartley
